article_meta.title: Trump’s Texas Deal Dilemma It’s Not Islamophobia, It’s Islamo-I’m-Sick-of-Hearing-About-It CNN Proves False Narratives A

reasoning: Strong compliance with attribution rule and multiple genuine author-prose bias instances correctly flagged. Minor misses of additional biased phrasings and a non-standard/less precise bias label reduce the score.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s own prose; no quoted or embedded source text was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged phrase shows clear loaded language, dismissal, or emotive framing in the author’s voice.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable biased author phrases such as 'did battle on the Hill,' 'prepared to do battle with Hill Democrats,' and 'broadside hit'/'mass deportation agenda.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly defensible, but some could be more precise (e.g., insults fit Mudslinging better than Spin), and one entry used a non-listed combined label ('Spin / Sensationalism').
